title: Epigram Engraved On The Collar Of A Dog Which I Gave To His Royal Highness
content:
I am his Highness' dog at Kew;
Pray tell me, sir, whose dog are you
meaning:
This evocative piece by Alexander Pope, titled "Epigram Engraved On The Collar Of A Dog Which I Gave To His Royal Highness", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
